macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Markets Record Fourth Straight Weekly Loss Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Major US indices fell sharply on March 21, with the S&P 500 dropping 1.51% to 6,506.48 points (its lowest level in six months), the Nasdaq declining 2.01% to 21,647.61 points, and the Dow Jones falling 0.96% to 45,577.47 points. All three major indexes recorded their fourth consecutive weekly loss, driven by inflation concerns linked to rising oil prices stemming from Iran tensions and expectations that the Federal Reserve may raise rates rather than cut them in 2026.

items.title: Tech Stocks Decline Sharply; Super Micro Computer Plummets 33% on Smuggling Charges
items.summary: Major technology stocks experienced significant losses, with Nvidia and Tesla falling more than 3%, while Alphabet, Meta Platforms, and Microsoft dropped approximately 2%. Super Micro Computer collapsed 33% following reports of smuggling charges linked to AI technology exports.

items.title: European Markets Decline; Energy Stocks Mark 13th Straight Weekly Gain
items.summary: European indices fell on March 21, with the DAX Index dropping 2.01% to 22,380.19 points, the FTSE 100 declining 1.44% to 9,918.33 points, and the Paris CAC 40 falling 1.82% to 7,665.62 points. Despite broader market weakness, energy stocks remained stable and achieved their 13th consecutive weekly gain.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Rally Ahead of Fed Rate Cut
items.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum rose in anticipation of a Federal Reserve rate cut decision with 90% probability, while altcoins like RIVER (+8.9%) and PI Network (+7.4%) gained on token unlocks and Protocol 20 upgrade enabling smart contracts.

items.title: SEC and CFTC Issue Joint Crypto Asset Classification Framework
items.summary: On March 17, 2026, the SEC and CFTC released an interpretive release classifying crypto assets as digital commodities or collectibles, providing regulatory clarity and coordinating on non-security assets like Algorand.

items.title: Early Bitcoin Investors Sell $117M While Whales Accumulate
items.summary: Early holders sold $117 million in BTC on March 19, but whales added 8,400 BTC post-Fed decision, with Bitcoin holding above $70,500 amid low exchange supply and ETF inflows.

items.title: Senate Banking Committee Targets Crypto Clarity Act Markup in April
items.summary: Politico reports a tentative agreement on stablecoin yields, with the Clarity Act potentially advancing via Senate Banking markup in late April, boosting market structure bill prospects.

items.title: Kraken Pauses IPO Amid $564B Crypto Market Decline
items.summary: Kraken's parent Payward halted IPO plans as the total crypto market dropped from $3.2 trillion to $2.5 trillion in 2026, citing poor conditions.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Super: 120B Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE Model
items.summary: NVIDIA launched Nemotron 3 Super, a 120B parameter hybrid Mamba-Transformer Mixture of Experts model with 12B active parameters, 1M context length, and 2.2x throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B. Details include pricing, benchmarks, architecture, and API access.

items.title: Post-Training Advances in 2026: GRPO, DAPO, RLVR Replace RLHF as Dominant Stack
items.summary: A technical survey details how GRPO, DAPO, RLVR, and synthetic self-play have surpassed RLHF in post-training for LLMs, explaining the changes and reasons behind the shift.

items.title: Northrop Grumman and Shield AI Demonstrate Mission Autonomy Software on Talon IQ Testbed
items.summary: Northrop Grumman's Talon IQ testbed successfully flew using Shield AI's Hivemind autonomy software, transitioning from hardware-in-the-loop to flight in one day. The test showcased open-architecture integration for faster defense AI development.

items.title: Kontron Partners with SiMa.ai for KBox A-151 EAI Industrial Edge AI Platform
items.summary: Kontron announced the KBox A-151 EAI, powered by SiMa.ai's MLSoC Modalix accelerator, delivering over 50 TOPS for physical AI in industrial edge applications.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Minecraft Live 2026 Reveals Chaos Cubed Update and New Redstone Physics
items.summary: Minecraft Live 2026 announced the 'Chaos Cubed' update featuring new redstone physics, blocks giving effects, a weird passive mob, and more. It also confirmed the Tiny Takeover update (version 26.1 Java/26.10 Bedrock) releasing on March 24th.[1][2]

items.title: Minecraft Announces Minecraft World Theme Park
items.summary: Minecraft revealed an upcoming real-life theme park called Minecraft World, including rides, interactive events, and themed restaurants. The announcement was made during Minecraft Live 2026.[1][2]

items.title: Minecraft Dungeons Sequel Officially Revealed as 'Spice Wood'
items.summary: Minecraft announced its next game, a sequel to Minecraft Dungeons previously leaked as 'Spice Wood', set for release in 2026. This was highlighted during the Minecraft Live 2026 event.[1]

items.title: PS5 Outsells Nintendo Switch 2 in February 2026 Sales
items.summary: PlayStation 5 outsold the Nintendo Switch 2 in February 2026, amid broader console market developments. A larger story is hinted at in recent gaming sales analysis.[4]

items.title: New Free Games Roundup for March 21-22 Weekend
items.summary: A comprehensive list of new free games across PC, console, and mobile platforms is available for the March 21-22, 2026 weekend. Gamers can claim these freebies from various platforms.[3]

items.title: Minecraft Live 2026 Leaks and Teasers Circulate Online
items.summary: Leaks and teasers for Minecraft Live 2026 surfaced, building hype for announcements like the theme park and Chaos Cubed update. Community discussions highlight excitement around untheorized features.[2]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Education Ministry Organizes Bharat Innovates Deep-Tech Pre-Summit
items.summary: India's Ministry of Education is hosting a two-day pre-summit of Bharat Innovates Deep-Tech at IIT Bombay, showcasing 137 promising deep-tech startups across 13 critical technology domains including advanced computing, healthcare, space and defence, semiconductors, and manufacturing.

items.title: Amazon Revives Smartphone Project Called 'Transformer'
items.summary: Amazon is reportedly working on a new smartphone internally called 'Transformer' that aims to simplify shopping, streaming, and other Amazon services with personalized features and embedded capabilities.
